name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that isn't currently possible (or is awkward)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API/option you'd like to see. A short code sketch helps:

```js
rollup2.rollup({
  // ...
});
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're currently using, or other approaches you considered.
